data.name: DHydroConfigDescription
data.value:
<control> The <control> specifies the workflow of the deltaresHydro executable. It indicates which components are started in which order. If the data transfer is to be arranged by the main program "d_hydro", then a coupler should be included. The main <control> block is a sequential block; this means that each component is initialized, time stepped, and finalized before the next component starts. <parallel> Within a <parallel> tag the components are started concurrently (if the mpi process ids listed per component don't overlap) or executed synchronously in sequence (first all initialize, then time stepping, and to conclude all finalization calls). <start> A <parallel> block contains exactly one <start/> component, defining the start and end time of the simulation. This is the component inside the <parallel> block with the smallest time step. All other components must be defined with a <startGroup>. <startGroup> A <startGroup> should be used if a component (possibly including couplers) should only be executed at a subset of simulation time steps.
For each component/coupler there will be a corresponding component/coupler specification block defined below.

data.name: HydroModelApplicationPlugin_Description
data.value: Provides functionality to create and run integrated models.

data.name: coupled_1d2d
data.value: ..\Resources\1d2d.gif;System.Drawing.Bitmap, System.Drawing, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b03f5f7f11d50a3a

data.name: DHydroConfigWriter_CreateConfigDocument_Empty_model_cannot_generate_a_configuration_file_
data.value: Empty model cannot generate a configuration file.

data.name: HydroModelTimeSettingsViewModel_DetermineErrorText_Start_time_must_be_earlier_than_stop_time
data.value: Start time must be earlier than stop time

data.value: {0} days {1} hours {2} minutes {3} seconds

data.name: HydroModelTimeSettingsViewModel_DetermineErrorText_Time_step_must_be_positive
data.value: Time step must be positive

data.name: HydroModel_LogErrorsWhenUnsupportedWorkflow_The_workflow___0___is_currently_not_supported_in_DeltaShell
data.value: The workflow '{0}' is currently not supported in DeltaShell

data.value: Current Workflow cannot be empty

data.value: HydroModel Specific

data.value: Model hydroObject

data.name: HydroModelValidator_ConstructCurrentWorkflowReport_Workflow
data.value: Workflow

data.name: HydroModelValidator_ValidateIfModelNamesAreUnique_Two_or_more_activities_in_the_current_workflow_have_the_same_name___0____possibly_only_differing_by_uppercase_letters__Please_make_sure_that_these_activity_names_are_uniquely_named_
data.value: Two or more activities in the current workflow have the same name '{0}', possibly only differing by uppercase letters. Please make sure that these activity names are uniquely named.

data.name: HydroModel_LogInvalidActivities_The_integrated_model___0___could_not_initialize__Please_check_the_validation_report_
data.value: The integrated model '{0}' could not initialize. Please check the validation report.

data.name: HydroModelValidator_ConstructModelGridReport_Grid_Coordinate_System_type
data.value: Grid Coordinate System type

data.name: HydroModelValidator_ConstructModelGridReport_Wave_and_WaterFlowFM_Grids_need_to_be_of_the_same_type__either_Spherical_or_Cartesian__
data.value: Wave model and FlowFM model, have grids with a different coordinate system . These coordinate systems have to be of the same type (Cartesian or spherical) to run the integrated model
